The key point here seems to be that Steger and his team are going to the Arctic to demonstrate how global warming is affecting that region. The passage mentions that Steger is an environmentalist who has been warning about global warming for a while. The main purpose of the expedition is to take people to the "front lines of global warming" and let them see the changes happening there. The last paragraph also states that climate change is happening, but people can change too, implying that the focus is on the impact of global warming and the possibility of human response.
